_codex_staging.notes: Verizon transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official Verizon quarterly earnings webcast pages expose Webcast Transcript PDF links. Structured StockAnalysis rows are included as readable transcript fallbacks pending full direct PDF mapping.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.

coverage_summary.primary_structured_source: StockAnalysis transcript pages with official Verizon PDF context
coverage_summary.official_source_context: Verizon official webcast transcript PDFs; StockAnalysis structured fallback
